message:
feat(cli): add --examples global flag for curated workflows

Shows copy-pasteable workflow examples covering:
- Quick start and agent workflow patterns
- Playbook management
- System health and maintenance
- Learning from history (reflect, stale, top)
- Agent-native onboarding
- Safety guards (Project Hot Stove)

Supports both human-readable and --json output formats.

Also fixes type error in info.ts (loadPlaybook signature).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
